regime_fall.current_status: Iran faces an April 22 ceasefire deadline with US military escalation including 10,000 additional troops, three carrier strike groups, and expanded naval blockade enforcement, while Iran has re-closed the Strait of Hormuz and targeted commercial vessels in response. The regime experiences severe internal fracturing between President Pezeshkian and hardline IRGC forces, with second-round ceasefire talks potentially resuming in Pakistan within days amid threats of full Hormuz closure and a decade-long economic reconstruction outlook.
regime_fall.last_major_event: US military escalation combined with Iran's closure of the Strait of Hormuz and targeting of commercial vessels, alongside emergency Situation Room meeting at the White House and resumed ceasefire talks scheduled in Pakistan before April 22 deadline expiration.
